Our Services

We offer focused penetration testing services to help Texas businesses understand and improve their security posture.

External Penetration Testing

Simulates an attack from the outside internet. We test your publicly-facing systems—websites, email servers, VPNs, and remote access—to find what an attacker would see.

  • Internet-facing systems testing
  • DNS and infrastructure review
  • Credential spraying detection
  • Detailed findings report

Internal Penetration Testing

Assumes an attacker has gained access to your internal network. We test from that perspective to show you what damage could be done.

  • Internal network assessment
  • Privilege escalation testing
  • Lateral movement analysis
  • Active Directory security review

Web Application Testing

Deep assessment of your web applications, APIs, and interactive interfaces. We find the bugs before hackers do.

  • OWASP Top 10 testing
  • API security assessment
  • Authentication and authorization review
  • Business logic testing

Red Teaming

Realistic, full-scope attack simulations that test your organization's detection and response capabilities.

  • Multi-vector attack scenarios
  • Social engineering component
  • Blue team evaluation
  • Executive debrief and recommendations

Physical Site Review

We assess the physical security of your facilities to identify vulnerabilities that could allow unauthorized access.

  • Building access controls
  • Perimeter security
  • Video surveillance review
  • Visitor management procedures

Not Sure What You Need?

We're happy to talk through your requirements and recommend the right scope.

Get in Touch
